acceptance_criteria_covered: Resolve and validate tenant/orgUnit context on orgUnit-scoped ConnectShyft endpoints
Refuse missing/invalid orgUnit context with no data leakage
Refuse cross-tenant orgUnit attempts with deterministic refusal semantics
Require membership unless caller is tenant-privileged
Operator-facing refusal state for missing orgUnit context
Cross-tenant orgUnit deep-link refusal without UI data leakage
Tenant-privileged override messaging under canonical tenant boundary
